positive: A whimsical and stylized celestial landscape featuring constellations interwoven with bioluminescent flora. The central subject is a graceful, stylized crescent moon gently cradling a geometric arrangement of stars and nebulae in deep sapphire blue, emerald green, and shimmering gold. The composition should be highly symmetrical, featuring clean, defined silhouettes of cosmic elements and stylized flowers. Use bold lines and high contrast, mimicking linocut or woodcut style. The overall aesthetic should be magical, dreamy, and suitable for an all-over apparel print. Dramatic studio lighting, vibrant color saturation, high detail, graphic novel illustration style.
